definitions.text: An individual who has been granted personhood; usually a human being. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: Each person is unique, both mentally and physically.
Jack's always been a dog person, but I prefer cats.

definitions.text: A character or part, as in a play; a specific kind or manifestation of individual character, whether in real life, or in literary or dramatic representation; an assumed character.
Any one of the three hypostases of the Holy Trinity: the Father, Son, or Holy Spirit.
To represent as a person; to personify; to impersonate.
To man, to supply with staff or crew.
